controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? (Yes to stop, No to continue)

cb_step_1.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?
cb_step_1.instruction: Tick box if right leg fibula.

cb_step_2.title: Select the mandibular segmentation
cb_step_2.instruction: Choose a mandibular segmentation from the list.

cb_step_3.title: Select the fibula segmentation
cb_step_3.instruction: Choose a fibula segmentation from the list.

cb_step_4.title: Select the Mandible Volume
cb_step_4.instruction: Choose a scalar volume for the mandible.

cb_step_9.title: Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction

cb_step_10.title: Adjust slice intersection
cb_step_10.instruction: Drag cross lines to position and rotate.

cb_step_12.title: Show mandibular curve in View 1 and Red

cb_step_13.title: Draw mandibular curve
cb_step_13.instruction: Click to place curve points along the mandible on Red view.

cb_step_18.title: Place cutting plane
cb_step_18.instruction: Place this cutting plane, then click Done.

cb_step_20.title: Draw fibula line
cb_step_20.instruction: Place line on fibula in 3D View 2, start distal, end proximal.

cb_step_29.title: Adjust cut planes
cb_step_29.instruction: Drag plane handles to position and rotate.

cb_step_30.title: Regenerate reconstruction
cb_step_30.instruction: Click button to update after adjustments.

operation_descriptions: Change layout to Conventional
Toggle on slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view
Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction with Translate and Rotate
Configure mandibular curve display to show in View 1 and Red
Switch to BoneReconstructionPlanner custom layout
Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view

generate_syntax_issues.error: invalid syntax. Perhaps you forgot a comma? (<unknown>, line 22)
invalid syntax. Perhaps you forgot a comma? (<unknown>, line 72)

operation_descriptions: Create bone models from segmentations
Change layout to Conventional
Toggle on slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Toggle FOV Spacing match 2D for Red view
Enable slice intersection visibility and interaction with Translate and Rotate
Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.
Add mandibular curve via extension button
Configure mandibular curve display to show in View 1 and Red
Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.
Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.
Switch to BoneReconstructionPlanner custom layout
Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view
Add a cut plane via extension button

Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.
Add fibula line via extension button
Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.
Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.
Center fibula line using fibula model
Enable automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bone contact
Enable make all mandible planes rotate together
Generate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform them to mandible
Toggle on visibility of mandible planes
Toggle on interaction handles for mandible planes
Manually adjust the mandibular cut planes in the mandible 3D view by dragging the visible plane interaction handles until the positions and rotations look correct.
Regenerate reconstruction: update fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform to mandible
Toggle off visibility of mandible planes
Clear show original mandible model checkbox

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
